nasb.text: It came about in the sixth year, on the fifth day of the sixth month, as I was sitting in my house with the elders of Judah sitting before me, that the hand of the Lord God fell on me there.

esv.text: In the sixth year, in the sixth month, on the fifth day of the month, as I sat in my house, with the elders of Judah sitting before me, the hand of the Lord God fell upon me there.

cnv.text: 第六年六月五日，我坐在家中，猶大的眾長老也坐在我面前，在那裡主耶和華的靈降在我身上。

ccb.text: 第六年六月五日，我正在家中与犹大的众长老同坐，主耶和华的能力降在我身上。
